creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
Hello,

Thanks for creating the patch for me. I'm a little busy at the moment
(I'm on an internship). The patch looks good. I saw Xinerama support got
removed, which this patch addresses correctly.

Please commit the patch made by the originator. Thanks!

Yours,
-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
 WWW: http://g-rave.nl/
